code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(byte)
      if byte == 32 or byte == 9 or byte == 13 or byte == 10
        if string.len(current) > 0
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(byte)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if string.len(current) > 0
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let a = parse_line(line1)
  let b = parse_line(line2)

  mut unique: List<Int> = []
  for x in a
    if not list.contains(unique, x)
      unique = list.push(unique, x)
    end
  end
  for x in b
    if not list.contains(unique, x)
      unique = list.push(unique, x)
    end
  end

  let total = unique.len()
  mut output = ""
  mut count = 0
  mut have_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  mut done = false
  while not done
    if count >= total
      done = true
    else
      mut found = false
      mut min_val = 0
      for x in unique
        if not have_prev or x > prev
          if not found
            min_val = x
            found = true
          else
            if x < min_val
              min_val = x
            end
          end
        end
      end
      if found
        if count == 0
          output = "#{min_val}"
        else
          output = "#{output} #{min_val}"
        end
        prev = min_val
        have_prev = true
        count = count + 1
      else
        done = true
      end
    end
  end
  println(output)
end
